_comment: Eastern Sierra 395 passes + trailheads. Verified coords from USGS GNIS/Wikipedia. Markers tagged '(approx)' are estimated - confirm on the topo. Import into CalTopo: Import > choose this .geojson. Then use the Line tool with 'Snap to trail/route' to draw the actual track between trailhead and pass.

properties.title: Cottonwood Pass
properties.name: Cottonwood Pass
properties.label: Cottonwood Pass
properties.description:
~7 mi RT, ~1,200 ft gain. TH: Horseshoe Meadows.
Difficulty: Easy. Summit elev ~11,128 ft.
Trail: https://www.alltrails.com/trail/us/california/cottonwood-pass-new-army-pass-loop
Coord source: USGS GNIS.
